2604.06997.title: ChunQiuTR: Time-Keyed Temporal Retrieval in Classical Chinese Annals
2604.06997.paper_summary: Retrieval shapes how language models access and ground knowledge in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). In historical research, the target is often not an arbitrary relevant passage, but the exact record for a specific regnal month, where temporal consistency matters as much as topical relevance. This is especially challenging for Classical Chinese annals, where time is expressed through terse, implicit, non-Gregorian reign phrases that must be interpreted from surrounding context, so semantically plausible evidence can still be temporally invalid. We introduce \textbf{ChunQiuTR}, a time-keyed retrieval benchmark built from the \textit{Spring and Autumn Annals} and its exegetical tradition. ChunQiuTR organizes records by month-level reign keys and includes chrono-near confounders that mirror realistic retrieval failures. We further propose \textbf{CTD} (Calendrical Temporal Dual-encoder), a time-aware dual-encoder that combines Fourier-based absolute calendrical context with relative offset biasing. Experiments show consistent gains over strong semantic dual-encoder baselines under time-keyed evaluation, supporting retrieval-time temporal consistency as a key prerequisite for faithful downstream historical RAG. Our code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}{\texttt{github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}}.
2604.06997.paper_summary_zh: 檢索形塑了語言模型在檢索增強生成（RAG）中訪問和基礎知識的方式。在歷史研究中，目標往往不是任意相關的段落，而是特定統治月份的精確記錄，時間一致性與主題相關性同樣重要。這對於古典中文編年史尤其具有挑戰性，因為時間是通過簡潔、隱含的、非格里曆的統治短語來表達的，這些短語必須從周圍的上下文中解釋，因此語義上合理的證據仍然可能在時間上無效。我們介紹了\textbf{ChunQiuTR}，這是一個基於\textit{春秋}及其解釋傳統構建的時間鍵檢索基準。ChunQiuTR按月份級統治鍵組織記錄，並包括與現實檢索失敗相似的時間近混淆因子。我們進一步提出了\textbf{CTD}（日曆時間雙編碼器），這是一個時間感知的雙編碼器，結合了基於傅里葉的絕對日曆上下文和相對偏移偏置。實驗顯示，在時間鍵評估下，相較於強大的語義雙編碼基準，表現出一致的增益，支持檢索時間的時間一致性作為忠實下游歷史RAG的關鍵前提。我們的代碼和數據集可在\href{https://github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}{\texttt{github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}}獲得。
2604.06997.author: Yihao Wang et.al.
2604.06997.authors: Yihao Wang, Zijian He, Jie Ren, Keze Wang
